# QR Barcode Tools

QR Barcode Tools provides free browser-based tools for creating static QR codes and barcodes.

Core pages:
- /qr-code-generator/
- /barcode-generator/
- /wifi-qr-code-generator/
- /url-qr-code-generator/
- /vcard-qr-code-generator/
- /code-128-barcode-generator/
- /ean-13-barcode-generator/

Notes:
- Tools run in the browser.
- No sign-up is required.
- The site does not provide dynamic QR codes, short links, or scan tracking.
